title: ISO52016 Matrix and Physical verification registry

stages.name: Matrix solver stage
stages.scope: Reduced Matrix solver implementation and internal solver traceability.

stages.scope: Internal Matrix baseline fixtures and summary artifact policy.

stages.scope: Application-facing reduced Matrix baseline fixtures.

stages.scope: Independent manual external-validation anchors and stage/release gates.

stages.scope: Application-facing Matrix integration guards and artifact policy.

stages.name: Physical node model builder
stages.scope: ISO52016-inspired physical node model builder with internal engineering anchors.

stages.name: Physical surface model expansion
stages.scope: Surface and construction expansion for physical node model inputs.

stages.scope: Hourly physical boundary condition profiles for surfaces.

stages.name: Physical operation profile
stages.scope: Hourly operation profiles and boundary conductance overrides.

stages.name: Physical room simulation service
stages.scope: Physical builder-to-Matrix room energy simulation service adapter.

stages.name: Physical room model diagnostics
stages.scope: Physical topology and gain-distribution diagnostics.

stages.name: Physical verification orchestration
stages.scope: Physical-chain verification ownership in C# tooling.

stages.scope: Release-ready gate for physical model chain evidence.

stages.name: Physical model selection application guard
stages.scope: Application-facing guard for reduced Matrix default and explicit physical opt-in.

stages.name: Physical chain final readiness
stages.scope: Physical chain traceability and final readiness rollup.

stages.scope: Application integration hardening for physical selection boundaries.

stages.name: Physical branch hygiene
stages.scope: Repository hygiene gates for physical chain branch readiness.

stages.name: Physical chain stage registry
stages.scope: C#-owned physical chain registry verification and discoverability.

stages.scope: Framework contracts, fixtures, loader, and comparison engine for external numerical validation anchors.
